input.content:
Subject: Scheduled System Maintenance – Saturday, 2 AM to 6 AM

Dear Valued Users,

We are writing to inform you of an important scheduled maintenance window that will affect our services.

**Maintenance Details:**
Date: Saturday
Time: 2:00 AM – 6:00 AM (Local Time)
Duration: Approximately 4 hours

**What to Expect:**
During this maintenance window, our services will be temporarily unavailable. We recommend completing any critical tasks before this time and planning accordingly.

**Why We're Doing This:**
This scheduled maintenance is essential for:
• Improving system performance and reliability
• Implementing important security updates
• Conducting infrastructure upgrades
• Ensuring optimal service quality for all users

**What You Should Do:**
• Plan any time-sensitive activities before 2:00 AM Saturday
• Save your work and log out of the system before the maintenance begins
• Avoid submitting new requests during the maintenance window
• Be prepared to reconnect once services are restored

**Support:**
If you have any questions or concerns about this maintenance, please do not hesitate to contact our support team at [support contact information] or visit our status page at [status page URL].

We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and appreciate your patience and understanding. We are committed to minimizing disruption and ensuring the best possible service for you.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,

[Your Company Name]
IT Operations Team
[Contact Information]

final_response:
Perfect! I've created a professional maintenance notification email and saved it to `/workspace/maintenance-email.txt`. The email includes:

✅ **Clear subject line** with the maintenance details
✅ **Maintenance specifics** (Saturday, 2 AM – 6 AM)
✅ **Impact statement** explaining service availability
✅ **Rationale** for the maintenance
✅ **User instructions** on what to do before/during maintenance
✅ **Support information** section for questions
✅ **Professional tone** and courteous closing

You
